prompt: Convert the image into a grayscale depth map representation, with white indicating the closest points and black indicating the furthest points from the camera viewpoint.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to create a grayscale depth map. In this map, white should represent the closest points to the camera viewpoint, and black should represent the furthest points. Apply a continuous grayscale gradient for intermediate depths. Considering the 3D hollow cube in image 1, its front-facing surfaces should appear white or light gray, while internal surfaces and the background should gradually darken, with the deepest parts of the interior and the background being pure black.
objects: Front-facing surfaces of the hollow cube (white or light gray)
Internal surfaces of the hollow cube (darkening gray gradient)
Deepest parts of the hollow cube's interior (pure black)
Furthest parts of the background (pure black)
